channel.title: GitHub Astro Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Astro in GitHub

item.title: Lissy93/awesome-privacy
item.description: 🦄 A curated list of privacy & security-focused software and services

item.title: cworld1/astro-theme-pure
item.description: ⭐ A simple, fast and powerful blog & document theme built by Astro

item.title: arthelokyo/astrowind
item.description: ⭕️ AstroWind: A free template using Astro 5 and Tailwind CSS. Astro starter theme.

item.title: chrismwilliams/astro-theme-cactus
item.description: A simple Astro theme. Use it to create your blog or website.

item.title: saicaca/fuwari
item.description: ✨A static blog template built with Astro.

item.title: satnaing/astro-paper
item.description: A minimal, accessible and SEO-friendly Astro blog theme

item.title: incluud/accessible-astro-starter
item.description: An Accessible, WCAG compliant Starter Theme for Astro 5+ including several accessibility features such as, better focus-outline, landmarks, semantics, interactive components and skip-link navigation. Ships with Tailwind 4, Prettier and ESLint support.

item.title: treefarmstudio/odyssey-theme
item.description: A modern business marketing website theme/starter built with Astro 🚀
